skill1.kitLine: Activates when Full Burst ends; affects all Burst 3 Electric Code allies who previously cast their Burst Skill if self is in Wheel of Fortune status — The Magician: Cooldown of Skill 2 ▼ 75% for 15 sec.
skill1.note: Deliberate skip: engine has no skill-cooldown model and S2 is event-keyed to fullBurstEnd, so a CD reduction has nothing to act on. Residual assumption (per note): if S2 carries an internal CD > ~20s rotation the ungated 7.5% AD line could over-fire — assumed none.

skill1.kitLine: Same gated clause — Attack damage ▲ 180% for 15 sec.
skill1.note: fullBurstEnd → target burstCasters stage 3 Electric, attackDamagePct 180/15s. Wheel-of-Fortune gate approximated as everyN 2 / everyNOffset 1 (every 2nd FB-end). 'Previously cast' scope approximated as this-rotation burstCasters.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when Full Burst ends; affects all allies — ATK ▲ 5% of the skill user's ATK for 10 sec.
skill1.note: fullBurstEnd → target allies, casterAtkPct 5/10s. Ungated (no everyN) — matches prose, which carries no Wheel-of-Fortune condition on this line.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when Full Burst ends; affects all Burst 3 Electric Code allies who previously cast if self is in Wheel of Fortune status — Strength: ATK ▲ 180% of the skill user's ATK for 15 sec.
skill2.note: fullBurstEnd → target burstCasters stage 3 Electric, casterAtkPct 180/15s, everyN 2 / offset 1 (WoF gate approx). Same team-conditional + scope approximations as skill1[0].

skill2.kitLine: Activates when Full Burst ends; affects all allies if self is in Wheel of Fortune status — Death: Cooldown of Burst Skill ▼ 6 sec.
skill2.note: fullBurstEnd → target allies, burstCdr 6s, gated everyN 2 / offset 1 (WoF gate approx — prose gates this clause on Wheel of Fortune).

skill2.kitLine: Same gated clause — ATK ▲ 50% of the skill user's ATK for 5 sec.
skill2.note: Same block as Death: casterAtkPct 50/5s, everyN 2 / offset 1.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when Full Burst ends; affects all allies — Attack damage ▲ 7.5% for 10 sec.
skill2.note: fullBurstEnd → target allies, attackDamagePct 7.5/10s. Ungated (no everyN) — matches prose, no Wheel-of-Fortune condition on this line.

burst.kitLine: Affects all Electric Code allies — Wheel of Fortune: Attack damage ▲ 10% for 10 sec.
burst.note: burstCast → target alliesOfElement Electric, attackDamagePct 10/10s. This is the Wheel-of-Fortune status that gates S1/S2 (the gate itself is approximated via everyN in S1/S2, not derived from this buff).

burst.kitLine: Affects all enemies — Deals 300% of final ATK as Burst Skill damage.
burst.note: burstCast → target enemy, flatDamage atkPct 300. Per note: auto Full-Burst-exempt, burst-cast delivery.

burst.kitLine: Affects all enemies — Judgement: Damage taken ▲ 10% for 10 sec.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: the 180% Attack Damage grant targets Burst 3 Electric allies who cast their Burst Skill this rotation — inert in teams without one (⚑ unmeasured team-conditional).
documentedConfounds.why: Large 180% buff whose firing is team-dependent and unverified; model mirrors the condition (inert if no B3 Electric caster) but the targeting/'previously cast' scope is unmeasured, so a mismatch with the real firing rule would shift team damage.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: the 180% caster-ATK 'Strength' grant has the same Burst-3-Electric-caster condition — inert in teams without one (⚑).
documentedConfounds.why: Same class as above — a dominant caster-ATK grant, team-conditional and unmeasured; primary candidate for a sim-vs-real gap in qualifying teams.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1/skill2: Wheel of Fortune gate approximated as every-2nd-Full-Burst-end (assumes she bursts every other rotation at her 40s cooldown) — unverified against a recording (⚑).
documentedConfounds.why: The everyN 2 / offset 1 gate controls WHEN the 180/180 grants and Death (burstCdr 6 + 50% casterAtk) fire; if her real burst cadence or the 10s WoF window differs (e.g. multi-B2 teams, Death reducing her own CD to ~34s), the big buffs mis-time or mis-count.

documentedConfounds.text: cadence: RL fire cadence / reloadFrames 171 / 60-frame charge are unmeasured datamine values; bolt-recovery gap shipped ON, autofire unverified (⚑).
documentedConfounds.why: Directly drives normal-attack shot count; note estimates the bolt-recovery assumption alone swings shot count ~15–20%. Unmeasured cadence is a direct NA-damage confound.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: The Magician — Cooldown of Skill 2 ▼ 75% for 15 sec.
documentedConfounds.why: Documented deliberate skip: engine has no skill-CD model and S2 is event-keyed to fullBurstEnd, so the reduction has nothing to act on; author assumes S2 has no internal CD. Low gap risk unless that assumption is wrong (residual noted in the override note).

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑(2) RL bolt-recovery — default 22f gap SHIPPED ON; verify autofire → charFixes.noBoltRecovery (~15–20% shot count).
documentedConfounds.why: No charFixes/config is applied in the override; the default bolt-recovery gap is live and unverified. If real Arcana autofires with no bolt gap, NA shot count (and thus damage) is understated by ~15–20%.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑(4) 'previously cast their Burst Skill' scope — modeled as this-rotation burstCasters; persistence across rotations unverified.
documentedConfounds.why: Who qualifies for the 180/180 grants depends on whether 'previously cast' persists across rotations or resets; the model assumes this-rotation only. If persistence differs, the set of buffed allies (and total team damage) changes.

authorIntentSummary: The override is an explicit PARSER BASELINE HYPOTHESIS, not a validated model: skill1/skill2 blocks are preserved verbatim from a 2026-07-13 hand reconciliation while the burst slot was freshly authored in the 2026-07-16 kit-parse rollout (re-deriving identical to the prior parse). The author's core intent was to gate Arcana's big conditional grants — S1 180% Attack Damage, S2 180% caster-ATK 'Strength', and the 'Death' burstCdr 6 + 50% casterATK — behind the Wheel-of-Fortune status, approximated as every-2nd-Full-Burst-end (everyN 2 / offset 1) and retargeted from blanket Electric-allies to stage-3 Electric burst casters; the ungated team pieces (S1 5% casterATK, S2 7.5% AD) fire every FB-end, and the burst is Electric-allies 10% AD + 300% enemy flatDamage + 10% damage-taken Judgement. Known-not-yet-faithful spots (all open ⚑): the WoF gate timing, RL cadence/bolt-recovery (no charFixes applied), the team-conditional firing of the 180/180 grants, and the 'previously cast' scope; S1 'The Magician' skill-CD reduction is a deliberate documented unmodeled skip. Base arcana has no board data (the board-read row that matched the grep is the variant arcana-fortune-mate, NOT this unit).
